description: In a Hydra office, Whitehall and Bakshi discuss the ramifications of the unstable brainwashing of Donnie Gill and speculate about S.H.I.E.L.D.’s new leadership. Bakshi suggests promoting Simmons; Whitehall muses about using the Faustus method if Simmons proves disloyal. Their cold efficiency demonstrates the ever-present threat of deepening Simmons’ peril as a double agent within Hydra.

transcript.line: S.H.I.E.L.D.'s becoming a problem. Do we know who's in charge?
Please, bring it here. Thank you. I appreciate it.
Donnie's programming proved to be unstable.
One last thing. There's a scientist in our downstairs lab. I believe her talents are being wasted. I'd like authorization to bring her up here.
So, you trust her? I do now. But if I'm wrong... we'll make her comply.
